data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of actor/time metadata for every lifecycle transition, which is a critical requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific actor/time metadata associated with the lifecycle transitions of the bookings or policy breaches. This absence indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement, as there is no confirmation that such metadata is being captured or stored as required.
gaps: Missing actor/time metadata for lifecycle transitions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
